title: Sour Ukrainian Blackberries Soup
description: A light, bitter, keto-friendly soup featuring fresh blackberries, lemon, and herbs, perfect for meal prep.
instructions: Rinse the blackberries gently under cold water and drain.
In a saucepan, combine the rinsed blackberries and vegetable broth.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 8 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove the pot from heat and let the berries steep for 5 minutes for extra flavor.
Using an immersion blender, blend the mixture until smooth, or transfer to a blender in batches.
Stir in the lemon juice, stevia, salt, pepper, dill, and lemon zest until fully incorporated.
If a thicker consistency is desired, whisk in 1/4 teaspoon xanthan gum and let sit for 2 minutes.
Transfer the soup to airtight containers for meal prep.
Refrigerate and serve chilled or warmed to 60°C before consuming.
